user_management.description: Handles user registration, authentication, approval, and employee management

interactions.action: creates new user document with bcrypt password hashing
finds user by email and compares password using bcrypt
updates user status and approval metadata
finds approved users and counts their campaigns

campaign_management.description: Handles campaign creation, domain selection, launching, and tracking

interactions.action: creates campaign document with recipients, domains, and settings
injects tracking pixel and wrap links for open/click tracking
finds active domains for sender rotation
checks warmup limits before allowing campaign launch (indirect via worker)
adds bulk email sending jobs to BullMQ queue
selects appropriate transport (user SMTP or global Brevo) for sending
injects sent/bounced events via postfixLogParser
saves parsed log events to MongoDB
emits events via EventEmitter for SSE streaming
finds campaign and counts recipient statuses
aggregates open/click events and calculates rates
finds failed delivery events for timeline

domain_management.description: Handles domain verification, DKIM management, and external provider integration

interactions.action: creates domain document with sender email validation
checks MX, SPF, DKIM, and DMARC records
generates RSA key pair for DKIM
sends test email using domain credentials
fetches domains from Brevo, SparkPost, or VPS Postal

smtp_configuration.description: Manages user-specific SMTP configurations with encryption

interactions.action: encrypts SMTP password before storage
decrypts SMTP password for response/testing
creates transport and verifies SMTP connection
tests connection via HTTP API instead of SMTP

warmup_management.description: Manages email warmup schedule and rate limiting

interactions.action: retrieves warmup configuration and calculates current phase
updates warmup configuration (enabled, start date, manual limit)
gets current daily limit based on warmup phase
reserveSlot/releaseSlot manages daily sent count with date reset

monitoring_and_analytics.description: Provides analytics, monitoring, and event streaming capabilities

interactions.action: counts campaigns and aggregates sent/failed counts
counts opens, clicks, unsubscribes and calculates unique metrics
sets up SSE stream and attaches event listeners
emits 'event' and 'event_deleted' for SSE consumption
retrieves DMARC reports with limit and sort
aggregates DMARC policy compliance statistics

state_management.description: Handles application state, authentication, and data fetching

interactions.action: uses apiFetch for all backend API calls with automatic token handling
gets/sets/removes mailerToken and mailerUser for session persistence
triggers callback on 401 response to handle automatic logout
loads dashboard data (domains, campaigns, stats) when session token changes

view_interactions.description: Defines how different views interact and share data through React Router and props

interactions.action: passes campaigns, domains, overviewStats, and callback functions as props
passes domains and callback functions for domain management
passes onRefresh and onDeleteDomain callbacks (domain ID from route params)
passes domains and onSaveCampaign callback
passes user and showToast callback
passes user and showToast callback
passes showToast callback
passes showToast callback (employee ID from route params)
passes showToast callback
passes showToast callback
passes showToast callback (campaign ID from route params)
makes API calls through props passed from App or direct usage

component_specific_interactions.description: Details specific interactions within key frontend components

interactions.action: POST /campaigns to save draft, POST /campaigns/:id/launch to launch
GET /campaigns/:id/stats for statistics, DELETE /campaigns/:id for deletion
GET /domains/:id for details, DELETE /domains/:id for deletion, POST /domains/:id/verify for verification, POST /domains/:id/dkim/generate for DKIM, POST /domains/:id/test-send for test email

GET /events/stream for SSE connection, GET /events/stats for statistics, POST /events/clear-queue and /events/flush-queue for mail queue management, GET /events/export-failed for CSV export, DELETE /events and DELETE /events/:id for event deletion
GET /smtp-config for list, POST /smtp-config for creation, PUT /smtp-config/:id for update, DELETE /smtp-config/:id for deletion, POST /smtp-config/test for testing
